text:
COMMENT: The value was chosen using the last-best method for values from the monthly TAF (calendar year). 

This field is derived from the MC_PLAN_REIMBRSMT_TYPE_CD using the following logic: 
1 if MC_PLAN_REIMBRSMT_TYPE_CD equals “01”, “02”, “03” 
2 if MC_PLAN_REIMBRSMT_TYPE_CD equals “04” 
3 if MC_PLAN_REIMBRSMT_TYPE_CD equals “05” 
4 if MC_PLAN_REIMBRSMT_TYPE_CD equals “06,” “08” 
5 if MC_PLAN_REIMBRSMT_TYPE_CD equals “07” ^ Back to TOC ^
